name: is_empty_vacuous_when_kernel_l4_end_ge_512
code:
proof fn phi_5_is_empty_vacuous_when_kernel_l4_end_ge_512(pt: PageTable)
    requires
        pt.kernel_l4_end >= 512,
        pt.l3_tables@.dom() == Set::<PageMapPtr>::empty(),
        pt.l2_tables@.dom() == Set::<PageMapPtr>::empty(),
        pt.l1_tables@.dom() == Set::<PageMapPtr>::empty(),
        pt.mapping_4k() == Map::<VAddr, MapEntry>::empty(),
        pt.mapping_2m() == Map::<VAddr, MapEntry>::empty(),
        pt.mapping_1g() == Map::<VAddr, MapEntry>::empty(),
    ensures
        pt.is_empty(),
{
}
reason: When kernel_l4_end >= 512 the L4 forall quantifier is vacuously true — is_empty holds regardless of what L4 entries contain, hiding arbitrarily non-empty entries behind a large kernel region
